children.heading: .—Delegates to National Conventions
children.label: a .—Delegates to National Conventions
children.text: Each post may elect delegates to national conventions of the corporation. The delegates each have one vote in the conduct of business of the convention to which they are elected.
one member elected to represent each department; and
the officers of the corporation as ex officio members.
The officers of the corporation are a national commander, two national vice commanders, a finance officer, a judge advocate, a chaplain, six national district commanders, and a provost marshal.
The officers shall be elected by the delegates at the annual national convention.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: d .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The requirements for holding office in the corporation may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, or national origin.
